prompt_md: During the coding phase, you are assembling a well-structured prompt that asks a model to generate unit tests for a function. Arrange the fragments below into the recommended order: role/policy first (system), then the code to test wrapped in delimiters, then the task, then a few-shot style example, and finally the explicit output-format instruction.

items: Example of our test style: <test>def test_parse_price_valid(): assert parse_price("9.99") == 9.99</test>
System: You are a senior Python engineer. Use pytest only and never invent functions that aren't shown.
Return a single test file and no prose.
Your task: write unit tests covering a valid price, an empty string, a negative value, and a non-numeric input.
